name: The Role of Sirolimus in Preventing Functional Decline in Older Adults
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry record for a recruiting randomized phase 2 sirolimus trial in adults 65 to 80 years old, with estimated enrollment of 10, estimated primary completion in September 2027, estimated study completion in November 2027, and no posted results in the June 14, 2026 API check.
authors: University of Texas Southwestern Medical Center
